text: Maintain first-class Spend Pool and attributable transaction Pool Assignment independently from account, instrument, cardholder, and category. Evidence: direct — the owner requires company-paid discretionary or personal-expense spending to remain separate from personal after-tax spending; workflow UC-LEDGER-018.
target: The owner can represent at least the required company-paid and personal-after-tax pools, preserve stable pool identity and assignment history, expose unassigned-pool actuals, and return exact actuals by pool and category through public Ledger queries.
